primary_result.description: FinnGen T1DM diabetic coma endpoint — ICD-8 coded, previously-UNMAPPED

pancreas_run_documented_mismatch.reason_for_zero_match: C3_CANCER is defined by canc_topo='ANY' + canc_morph='ANY' (Finnish Cancer Registry codes / ICD-O-3). Phase 13's ICDO3 cross-walk covers only 51 leaf codes vs the registry's full topology/morphology space. The resolver lifted 3 drug concepts but 0 condition concepts. PANCREAS corpus (361 pancreatic cancer patients) does not carry the 3 anti-cancer drug concepts, hence subject_count=0.

source_substitution_rationale: Plan 13-08 Task 4 specified PANCREAS as the smoke-test source. PANCREAS is a narrow pancreatic cancer corpus (361 patients, all pancreatic cancer). The previously-UNMAPPED FinnGen endpoints that lifted via Phase 13 are overwhelmingly Finnish-registry-specific phenotypes (diabetic complications, rare cancers, Kela reimbursements) that don't overlap with PANCREAS's narrow phenotype even via ancestor expansion. Primary smoke test therefore runs on SYNPUF (2.3M CMS patients, diverse diagnoses) which validates the same pipeline (API → queue → Darkstar R worker → subject_count > 0) end-to-end. The PANCREAS run documented above proves the SAME pipeline works on PANCREAS too — it just returns 0 subjects due to phenotype mismatch, not a Phase 13 defect.
